notes: NEXT FUNDS TOPIX ETF (Nomura) 10-for-1 share split. Record date 2026-03-31; effective date 2026-04-01. Ex-rights date is 2026-03-30 = record date minus 1 business day under Japan's T+2 settlement (last day with rights was Fri 2026-03-27 = our last old-scale weekly close at 3827). The TSE first quotes the split-adjusted price on the ex-rights date. Yahoo's corporate-actions feed is missing this split so auto_adjust=True cannot back-adjust it. apply_manual_splits divides prices strictly before ex_date by 10.
